title: psorothamnus emoryi
intro: Psorothamnus emoryi, also known as Emory Clover, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Emory Clover include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and potentially aiding in the treatment of wounds and infections. Emory Clover can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
